scripts.kill-port: node -e "const p=process.env.PORT||5173;require('child_process').execSync(process.platform==='win32'?`powershell -Command \"Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort ${p} -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\"`:`fuser -k ${p}/tcp || true`,{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.fresh: npm run kill-port && npm run dev
